window.title: Choose Job Type on interface. Six skills will be below. Click[V]on lower right to confirm the job.
Current skill list
window.tooltext: Lists [learned skills] but [unavailable skills] will not be displayed to facilitate purchases.

window.title: 1.Angel, move mouse to find cursor becomes \n . Then left click where you want to go. Charater will reach the chosen location when cursor becomes \n
1. Arahkan kursor pada <NPC>, maka bentuk kursor akan berubah.\nKlik NPC, maka kamu bisa bicara dengan NPC.
2. Talk to the NPCs. They need your help.
Click Charater Information on the top left to understand your current profession. The name of the profession will be changed as the skills change.

The warehouse is the place where Angels preserves their personal items. During adventures, various equipment and props will fill player's bags. It is important to take out items from the bag and preserve them in warehouse regularly. To rent a Safe will enlarge the capacity
Burden represents the burden of your bag. Every item has weight. Move the cursor upon them to understand the weight of item.(Picture 1)

When the Exp bar has been filled, characters will be upgraded. Defeating monsters and completing quests will increase character's Exp. When the Exp bar is filled, LEVEL UP will appear to congratulate you for upgrading.

The right mouse button can use magic. Every magic spell will consume a player's MP. Magic can be learned through buying mana scrolls. At the top left, the blue MP bar show the MP's upper limit and current level.
1. Equipment offers players many kinds of abilities. Players have to equip them to get these additional abilities. Click the props in the function bar, choose props and equip them.
When Character's HP is 0, it will become an Angel Spirit. Now it's the time to revive at the renascence place.
Games offer players the skill changing design. But only equipment skills can get Exp increases. Create more distinctive characters.
When character's HP is 0, the reborn point is where the character revives. So deciding where to reborn is quite important.
(Picture 1) To find the NPC to set a renascence place.
1.Making various equipment with raw materials is either a way to self-supply or to make profits through trade with other players. Different production methods require different raw materials.
1.Collection is when you collect various raw materials. There are rich resources in every cornor of the world. Make use of \n kinds of collection equipment to get raw materials.
(Picture1-4) Resources in every cornor of the world
When the cursor is upon a monster, the attack will start. Defeating a monster will increase the players Exp. It is important to fight to upgrade.
When a character's HP and MP are low, enough rest can restore them. Press the Insert key to sit down and get some rest.
Enough rest will ensure the success of a fight.
Camps in the Garden of Eden

In Garden of Eden, four camps are available. They are unique camps. Before players decide which one to join, it is better to understand their backgroud. Choose the one which will attract you the most to make great contributions. The totems of Holy City, Dark City, Breeze

When the cursor is upon a monster, the left picture represents the monster's tribe. When a monster is grown up,it may learn skills and mana which will produce damage upon its tribe. A good use of these skills and mana will make the fight more smooth.
(Like picture) The tribe is beside the name. More tribes are waiting for you to discover in the Garden of Eden
How to keep a stall and trade
In the props bar, players can find two buttons for[Trade]and[Stall]. The way to Trade is one-on-one. A stall gives players the chance to be a merchant and display their goods to any passing players.

The duration of the equipment will be gradually reduced. When duration becomes 0, the equipement can't be used. Therefore, players have to find the revelvant NPC to restore the duration of the equipment.



(like the right picture) show the upper limit of duration an

When the equipment's level has been upgraded, \n extra abilities will added to character. Higher levels represents higher proficiency and \n more extra additional abilities. Therefore, proficiency in skills is important to realize upgrading.

Players will obtain various mounts. They can increase players'speed, or strengthen players' defensive and collection ability\n. Just like common equipment, mounts should be equipped in the character field.

Euipping Felling Axe to collect wood.
 Different wood requires different skill levels. Proficiency in skills allows players to collect rare wood. ~


 The picture reminds player to equip Felling Axe and begin to collect.

Equip Moyle to collect raw ore.
 Different ore requires different skill levels. Proficiency in skills allows players to collect rare ores. ~


 The picture reminds player to equip Moyle and begin to collect.

Praparing the Fishing Rod to collect floating leaf plants.
 Different floating leaf plants require differen skill levels. Proficiency
 in skills allows players to collect rare floating leaf plants. ~


 The picture reminds player to equip fishing rod

Equipping the Collection Gloves to collect raw herbs.
 Different herbs require different skill levels. Proficiency in skills allows players to collect rare herbs.~


 The picture reminds player to equip Collection Gloves

Click the Log Interface below to open \n the Quest Log where various quests given to players will be recorded. Moreover, its tracing function will provide players with the convenience of easily understanding quests.
Click the Group Interface below to use the group function to make the completion of \n quests and killing monster go more smoothly.
Click the Friend Interface below to use \n relevant functions for making friends. Add players sharing the same interests with you to your friend list to keep in touch with each other.
(Like the picture above) The Friend interface provides lots of functions. A good study of it is required.
Open the emoticon list to use various vivid emotions during chat. Player can show their friends how they are feeling by dragging emoticons into the hotkey bar.

If players want to adjust the relevant computer settings 
, they should open the system interface below and they can adjust 
 picture settings 
,sound effect sets and game sets.
Clikc the Map Interface below to open \n a big map of the game world on which it will show you the location and names of NPCs, as well as your current location.

Talk to players by entering information into the talkbar. Four kinds of talkbars 
 are available now. Players can adjust the information filters by themselves.

2. If a player wants to give a speech, they can choose 
 the speech channel.
Enter what you want to broadcast
[Trading Password] ensures trading security. Set or not?
自動幫助寵物
window.tooltext: 開啟自動幫助寵物使用道具技能

window.title: 自動管教寵物
window.tooltext: 當寵物生級時自動管教寵物
